scripts.dev:all: docker compose up -d db && wait-on tcp:127.0.0.1:5433 -t 120000 && cross-env DATABASE_URL=postgresql://lrv:lrv@127.0.0.1:5433/lrv PGSSLMODE=disable JWT_SECRET=dev-local-jwt-secret-change-me CORS_ORIGINS=http://localhost:5173 FRONTEND_URL=http://localhost:5173 VITE_API_URL=/api concurrently -k -n api,web -c cyan,magenta "npm run dev --prefix backend-node" "vite"
scripts.dev:all:sqlite: cross-env JWT_SECRET=dev-local-jwt-secret-change-me CORS_ORIGINS=http://localhost:5173 FRONTEND_URL=http://localhost:5173 VITE_API_URL=/api concurrently -k -n api,web -c cyan,magenta "npm run dev --prefix backend-node" "vite"
